signals.headline: Powell Confirms He Will Stay as Fed Chair Until Successor Confirmed** | **NO** | **HIGH** confidence
signals.raw:
Powell Confirms He Will Stay as Fed Chair Until Successor Confirmed** | **NO** | **HIGH** confidence

Jerome Powell stated he will remain in his role as Federal Reserve Chair pro tem until a successor is confirmed by the Senate at the end of his term in May 2026, per the law and past precedent[1][3]. This follows President Trump's January 2026 nomination of Kevin Warsh as successor, which faces Se
